languages.text: "Я желал все сделать быстро и бескровно. Но гражданская война на флагмане? Я не уподоблюсь проклятому Гогу Вандиру..." {n}Себериан замолкает, опускает голову с жужжанием механического позвоночника, собирая волю в кулак.{/n} "Я отказываюсь от своих притязаний, {name}. Мы решим этот вопрос позже, когда минует кризис. И в том я принесу клятву. Перед самим Патентом". {n}Но даже свою капитуляцию и просьбу он оглашает как вердикт и повеление.{/n}

"I wished to do this swiftly and without bloodshed. But a civil war aboard the flagship? I shall not become like the accursed Goge Vandire..." {n}Seberian falls silent, lowering his head with the whirring of his mechanical spine, before mustering his resolve.{/n} "I withdraw my claim, {name}. We shall settle this matter later, once the crisis has passed. And on that, I shall swear an oath. Before the Warrant itself." {n}Yet he voices even his capitulation and request as both a verdict and a command.{/n}

We shall settle this matter later, once the crisis has passed. And on that, I shall swear an oath. Before the Warrant itself." {n}Yet even his capitulation and request he announces as a verdict and a command.{/n}

languages.text: “我本想快刀斩乱麻、不见血地解决这一切。可在旗舰上发动内战？我可不想变成那该死的戈治·范迪尔……”{n}塞贝里安沉默下来，缓缓垂下头，机械脊椎嗡嗡作响，而后他重振决心。{/n}“我撤回继承主张，{name}。等危机过去，我们再来了结此事。为此，我将在这贸易授状前立下誓言。”{n}可即便是在认输、恳求，他都带着一副宣判与命令的口吻。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wished to do this swiftly and without bloodshed. But a civil war aboard the flagship? I shall not become like the accursed Goge Vandire..." {n}Seberian falls silent, lowering his head with the whirring of his mechanical spine, before mustering his resolve.{/n} "I withdraw my claim, {name}. We shall settle this matter later, once the crisis has passed. And on that, I shall swear an oath. Before the Warrant itself." {n}Yet he voices even his capitulation and request as both a verdict and a command.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我本想快刀斩乱麻、不见血地解决这一切。可在旗舰上发动内战？我可不想变成那该死的戈治·范迪尔……”{n}塞贝里安沉默下来，缓缓垂下头，机械脊椎嗡嗡作响，而后他重振决心。{/n}“我撤回继承主张，{name}。等危机过去，我们再来了结此事。为此，我将在这贸易授状前立下誓言。”{n}可即便是在认输、恳求，他都带着一副宣判与命令的口吻。{/n}

languages.text: «Quería hacer esto de forma rápida y sin derramamiento de sangre, pero ¿una guerra civil en la nave insignia? No me convertiré en un nuevo Goge Vandire...». {n}Seberian guarda silencio y agacha la cabeza con un chirrido sonoro de su columna vertebral mecánica, antes de recuperar la compostura.{/n} «Retiro mi reclamación, {name}. Ya resolveremos esto más adelante, una vez pasada la crisis. Estoy dispuesto a jurarlo. Ante la Patente». {n}Formula hasta su rendición y su petición como si fueran un veredicto y una orden.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wished to do this swiftly and without bloodshed. But a civil war aboard the flagship? I shall not become like the accursed Goge Vandire..." {n}Seberian falls silent, lowering his head with the whirring of his mechanical spine, before mustering his resolve.{/n} "I withdraw my claim, {name}. We shall settle this matter later, once the crisis has passed. And on that, I shall swear an oath. Before the Warrant itself." {n}Yet he voices even his capitulation and request as both a verdict and a command.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Quería hacer esto de forma rápida y sin derramamiento de sangre, pero ¿una guerra civil en la nave insignia? No me convertiré en un nuevo Goge Vandire...». {n}Seberian guarda silencio y agacha la cabeza con un chirrido sonoro de su columna vertebral mecánica, antes de recuperar la compostura.{/n} «Retiro mi reclamación, {name}. Ya resolveremos esto más adelante, una vez pasada la crisis. Estoy dispuesto a jurarlo. Ante la Patente». {n}Formula hasta su rendición y su petición como si fueran un veredicto y una orden.{/n}

languages.text: « Je souhaitais procéder rapidement, et sans bain de sang. Mais une guerre civile à bord du vaisseau amiral ? Je refuse de devenir comme l'infâme Goge Vandire... » {n}Seberian s'interrompt, le ronronnement de sa colonne vertébrale mécanique accompagnant son mouvement lorsqu'il incline la tête. Il raffermit sa résolution et reprend la parole :{/n} « Je me retire, {name}. Nous réglerons ce problème plus tard, une fois la crise passée. Que la lettre de marque m'en soit témoin. » {n}Même dans la capitulation, sa voix exprime l'assurance de qui prononce un ordre ou un verdict.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wished to do this swiftly and without bloodshed. But a civil war aboard the flagship? I shall not become like the accursed Goge Vandire..." {n}Seberian falls silent, lowering his head with the whirring of his mechanical spine, before mustering his resolve.{/n} "I withdraw my claim, {name}. We shall settle this matter later, once the crisis has passed. And on that, I shall swear an oath. Before the Warrant itself." {n}Yet he voices even his capitulation and request as both a verdict and a command.{/n}

Il raffermit sa résolution et reprend la parole :{/n} « Je me retire, {name}. Nous réglerons ce problème plus tard, une fois la crise passée. Que la lettre de marque m'en soit témoin. » {n}Même dans la capitulation, sa voix exprime l'assurance de qui prononce un ordre ou un verdict.{/n}

languages.text: "Bunu hızla ve kan dökmeden yapmak istiyordum. Ancak sancak gemisinde iç savaş çıkarmak mı? Kahrolası Goge Vandire'ye benzemeyeceğim..." {n}Seberian; mekanik omurgasının vızıltısıyla başını eğerek sessizleşiyor, ardından kararlılığını topluyor.{/n} "İddiamdan vazgeçiyorum {name}. Bu meseleyi daha sonra, kriz geçtikten sonra halledeceğiz. Yemin ediyorum. Bizzat Ruhsatname'nin huzurunda." {n}Ancak teslimiyetini ve talebini bile hem bir hüküm hem de bir emir gibi dile getiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wished to do this swiftly and without bloodshed. But a civil war aboard the flagship? I shall not become like the accursed Goge Vandire..." {n}Seberian falls silent, lowering his head with the whirring of his mechanical spine, before mustering his resolve.{/n} "I withdraw my claim, {name}. We shall settle this matter later, once the crisis has passed. And on that, I shall swear an oath. Before the Warrant itself." {n}Yet he voices even his capitulation and request as both a verdict and a command.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bunu hızla ve kan dökmeden yapmak istiyordum. Ancak sancak gemisinde iç savaş çıkarmak mı? Kahrolası Goge Vandire'ye benzemeyeceğim..." {n}Seberian; mekanik omurgasının vızıltısıyla başını eğerek sessizleşiyor, ardından kararlılığını topluyor.{/n} "İddiamdan vazgeçiyorum {name}. Bu meseleyi daha sonra, kriz geçtikten sonra halledeceğiz. Yemin ediyorum. Bizzat Ruhsatname'nin huzurunda." {n}Ancak teslimiyetini ve talebini bile hem bir hüküm hem de bir emir gibi dile getiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich wollte die Angelegenheit schnell und ohne Blutvergießen erledigen. Aber ein Bürgerkrieg auf dem Flaggschiff? Ich will nicht enden wie der verfluchte Goge Vandire ..." {n}Seberian verstummt und senkt mit einem Summen seines mechanischen Rückgrats den Kopf, ehe er seine Entschlossenheit wiederfindet.{/n} "Ich verzichte auf meinen Anspruch, {name}. Wir werden diese Angelegenheit später regeln, wenn die Krise vorbei ist. Und darauf schwöre ich einen Eid. Vor dem Handelsbrief selbst." {n}Allerdings klingt selbst seine Kapitulation wie ein Urteilsspruch und Befehl.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wished to do this swiftly and without bloodshed. But a civil war aboard the flagship? I shall not become like the accursed Goge Vandire..." {n}Seberian falls silent, lowering his head with the whirring of his mechanical spine, before mustering his resolve.{/n} "I withdraw my claim, {name}. We shall settle this matter later, once the crisis has passed. And on that, I shall swear an oath. Before the Warrant itself." {n}Yet he voices even his capitulation and request as both a verdict and a command.{/n}

Vor dem Handelsbrief selbst." {n}Allerdings klingt selbst seine Kapitulation wie ein Urteilsspruch und Befehl.{/n}

languages.text: 「私はこの事態を迅速に、そして血を流さずに解決したいと思っていました。しかし、旗艦内で内乱が勃発したとは... 呪われたゴジェ・ヴァンディールのようにならないように...」{n}セベリアンは静かにし、機械的な脊椎の回転音と共に頭を下げる。そして決意を固める。{/n}「私の要求を取り下げる、{name}。この危機が過ぎた後に、この件を解決する。そしてそのことを誓う。証書自体の前で。」{n}しかし、彼は降伏と要求を、同時に判決と命令として口にする。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wished to do this swiftly and without bloodshed. But a civil war aboard the flagship? I shall not become like the accursed Goge Vandire..." {n}Seberian falls silent, lowering his head with the whirring of his mechanical spine, before mustering his resolve.{/n} "I withdraw my claim, {name}. We shall settle this matter later, once the crisis has passed. And on that, I shall swear an oath. Before the Warrant itself." {n}Yet he voices even his capitulation and request as both a verdict and a command.{/n}
